name: cc-csharp-lsp
description: C# language server using csharp-ls - Roslyn-based LSP

interface.shortDescription: C# semantic code intelligence through csharp-ls
interface.longDescription: Adds csharp-ls-backed C# LSP tools to Codex through cc-lsp-now for semantic navigation, diagnostics, references, rename, and code actions.
defaultPrompt: Use C# LSP to inspect this symbol.
Use C# LSP diagnostics on this project.
Use C# LSP to rename this C# symbol.
